name: Couscous-Stuffed Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Simmer whole zucchini in salted water until soft for about 10 minutes.
3. Remove squash from water, slice lengthwise, and scrape pulp into a mixing bowl.
4. In a skillet, sauté onions and garlic in olive oil until clear.
5. Combine all ingredients: cooked couscous, crushed tomatoes, a pinch of dried basil leaves, fresh parsley minced, salt or salt substitute, and freshly-cracked pepper to taste.
6. Fill squash shells with the mixture.
7. Place on a cookie sheet and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 10 minutes or until piping hot.
8. Serve as a side dish.
